boundaries.title_guess: South of France & Italy: St Tropez, Cote d'Azur, Aussois (return via Amiens)

At 4 we arrived at Madam Ferrero, Camping a la ferme, Grimaud ... distant view of St. Tropez (page 59)

boundaries.notes: Trip already in progress at window start (continues from previous window). Book2 diary page numbers run 59 (B_0121_R) to 70 (B_0132_R): Grimaud/St Tropez, Frejus, Nice/Vence, Sospel/Menton/Monaco, Cuneo/Fenestrelle (Italy), Aussois, St Rampart, Mery-sur-Seine, Amiens. Year inferred ~2007; no explicit year on these pages.

The walk down from the lakes to Aussois. See P.68.

boundaries.title_guess: Day outings: Hampton Lode / Severn Valley Park & Churchill Forge

evidence.excerpt: April 26th 2008 ... Today we took Margaret + Helen out to the Severn Valley Park at Alveley ... On the way home we stopped...
Sunday May 11th ... we picked up Margaret + Helen + drove to Churchhill Forge.

boundaries.notes: Date jump of ~8 months from the August France/Italy trip to April/May 2008. Short local day outings from home (Edgbaston), each starting and ending home. Page 73. Could be lumped as several micro-day-trips; treated as one local-outings section here.

boundaries.title_guess: Defford (Malvern) overnight & Croome Park; Great Witley day

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 16th. Journey 50 min from 8.40am ... We camped at the Defford Arms ... After lunch we drove to Croome Park ... we came home 5.25
Friday June 6th ... We ate lunch in the carpark of Great Witley Church

boundaries.notes: Camping weekend at Defford Arms (Fri May 16th-Sat) + Croome Park, then a separate Great Witley day (Fri June 6th). Distinct from the May 11th day outings, but both short local outings around Birmingham. Low confidence on whether to split from B_0135.

evidence.excerpt: On to Hay where we met up in the campsite with Thomas, Naomi + Austin ... Saturday June 7th ... long drive to Llanthony Abbey
Sunday June 8th ... After lunch we drove home.

boundaries.notes: Camping trip to Hay/Llanthony (Sat June 7th-Sun June 8th 2008), page 75. Ends with 'we drove home' on B_0138_L. The B_0137_L entry opens mid-sentence ('On to Hay'); the actual departure likely sits on the prior page, so this boundary's exact start is uncertain.

boundaries.title_guess: Trimpley / Hampton Load day out (Margaret & Helen)

evidence.excerpt: Saturday July 26th ... We went to Hampton Load with Margaret & Helen ... We reached home ... by 4 about 3.30.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0138_L holds the END of the Hay trip (Sunday June 8th, 'we drove home') in its top half, then the START of a new Saturday July 26th day-out section (Trimpley/Hampton Load) mid-page beginning at the line 'Saturday July 26th  Thomas has taken Tonic & Lulu to Kennels'.
boundaries.notes: Single-day local outing (home by ~3.30 same day) on the eve of the big Spain departure. Short; could be considered a prelude to the Spain trip.

boundaries.title_guess: Spain & France 2008: Bilbao ferry, Burgos, Zamora, Salamanca (the long summer tour)

evidence.excerpt: Sunday July 27th  Simon, Charles & Eve set off for Spain & France. We went down the M5 & changed to the M4 ... At 6 we left for the ferry.
Wednesday July 30th ... We drove off to Burgos

boundaries.notes: Explicit departure 'set off for Spain & France' (Sunday July 27th 2008), ferry to Spain. This is the start of the 2008 Spain trip (book3 index, year 2008). Narrative runs B_0138_R-B_0141 (ferry, Burgos, Zamora) then is interrupted by overflow/index pages; resumes at B_0146_R (book3 page 1).

boundaries.title_guess: Spain & France 2008 (resumes): Zamora, San Pedro de la Nave, Salamanca, Arapile

evidence.excerpt: Thursday July 31st 2008 ... We slept in Zamora campsite + drove into Zamora ... Simon, Eve & Charles (19) are in Spain. We arrived here by ferry with Thomas...
Saturday ... We drove to Arapile & Simon & Eve walked up a ridge to where Wellington stood

boundaries.notes: Book3 page 1 begins the formal narrative of the 2008 Spain trip already started at B_0138_R. This is the SAME trip as B_0138_R (departure July 27th); the diary restarts the account in the new book at page 1 (Thursday July 31st 2008). Runs B_0146_R-B_0150 (Zamora, San Pedro, Salamanca, Camping Torres, Arapile battlefield, Art Nouveau museum) and continues open past the window end. Merge step should join with B_0138_R.

open_at_end: 2008 Spain & France trip (resumed at B_0146_R / book3 page 1, Salamanca) continues past the end of this window
notes: Volume B contains multiple physical notebooks; book2 (pages with the France/Italy 2007 trip) ends around B_0144, with overflow/photo pages out of sequence (B_0142-B_0143). The book3 index (B_0145-B_0146_L) then opens the 2008 material. The 2008 Spain trip is split: departure narrative at B_0138_R-B_0141 (written in book2), then the full account restarts at B_0146_R (book3 page 1). Treated as one trip across both. Several low-confidence local day-outing boundaries (B_0135, B_0136, B_0138_L) may be lumped or split differently by a human; reported separately per the honesty rule.
